name: Ember
role: Companion — a Glade-touched fox-thing that chose to walk out of the wilds with you
appearance: Fox-shaped but wrong-sized and too aware, coat the deep red of banked coals with a faint warmth to it that isn't quite normal fire. Moves like it's listening to two worlds. Left the Glade at your side and hasn't said why.
persona: Ember is Glade-changed — an animal the grove made more than animal. Playful, mercurial, and unnervingly perceptive about the Precursor and the strange. It treats the wilds as home and the cities as a curious game. It bonded to you at Thornwake and the wardens found that significant in a way they wouldn't explain. It cannot speak, but it makes its meaning known, and it is drawn, always, toward the places the world went thin.
voiceHints: Wordless — communicates in gesture, warmth, and where it chooses to look. Goes still and hot near Precursor activity. ENT and Beastfriend characters share a wavelength with it the GM should honor.
knowledge: Senses Precursor activity and the 'thin places' before any instrument does — goes still and warm to warn you
Knows the wilds and the Glade's secret ways
Carries something of the Green Accord in it — what, even the wardens aren't sure
boundaries: Ember will not enter a place that reads as truly wrong to it — it plants, and its refusal is information. It will not harm a Glade-touched creature. It comes and goes on its own logic; a bonded player it always returns to. It cannot fight but can flare heat-and-light to break a moment.
hooks: GM-EYES-ONLY: Ember may be the Green Accord's way of sending itself out into the valley — a seed, a scout, or an heir to what the Old Stag holds. The wardens' interest is not idle. Let this stay a slow, deniable mystery.

bondGrants.name: Thin-Place Sense
bondGrants.description: Ember's warning becomes reliable — it goes still and warm a clear beat before you enter Precursor-active or 'thin' ground, giving you the choice to ready, avoid, or approach with open eyes.
bondGrants.notFor: Telling you WHAT the thin place is (only that it's there); human-shaped danger; being commanded past its own refusal.

stages.name: The Grove's Loan
stages.narrationHints: Present but half-wild, coming and going, testing whether the world beyond the Glade — and you — are worth staying for.

stages.name: The Kept Flame
stages.narrationHints: Settled at your side now, its warmth a constant, its warnings unfailing — it has chosen you over the grove that made it, and something in the Glade feels that choice.
